name: elsevier-mcp
description: Search Scopus, retrieve ScienceDirect articles and full texts, look up journals, authors, citations, and more via Elsevier APIs.

inst_token.title: Institutional Token
inst_token.description: Optional institutional token for expanded access

enable_all_tools.title: Enable All Tools
enable_all_tools.description: Set to 'true' to enable all 14 tools (requires institutional access). Leave empty for 6 free tools only.

tools.name: abstract_retrieval
tools.description: Retrieve abstract and metadata by identifier

tools.name: fulltext_retrieval
tools.description: Retrieve full text of a ScienceDirect article as plain text

tools.name: serial_title_search
tools.description: Search for journals by title, ISSN, or subject

tools.name: subject_classifications
tools.description: Look up subject area codes and descriptions

tools.name: citations_overview
tools.description: Detailed citation overview with yearly breakdowns
